## Summary

Briefly describe the documentation or roadmap change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Vision / philosophy clarification
- [ ] Roadmap checklist update
- [ ] Strategy doc (`docs/`)
- [ ] Diagram
- [ ] Milestone plan
- [ ] App brief
- [ ] Templates / meta

## Current vs future

Call out anything that is **aspirational** so readers do not mistake it for shipped capability.

## Checklist

- [ ] Links resolve
- [ ] No application source code added
- [ ] No secrets or private commercial strategy
- [ ] Wellness / licensing language remains accurate
- [ ] Philosophy remains Build → Validate → Improve → Document → Share
- [ ] `docs/decision-log.md` updated if this is a meaningful decision
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` checkboxes still honest

## Related issues

Closes #
